text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 8 

ADMTG_DGNS_VRSN_CD 

LABEL: Admitting Diagnosis Version Code (ICD-9 or ICD-10) 

DESCRIPTION: Effective with Version 'J', the code used to indicate if the admitting diagnosis code (variable called 
AD_DGNS) is ICD-9 or ICD-10. 

SHORT NAME: ADMTG_DGNS_VRSN_CD 

LONG NAME: ADMTG_DGNS_VRSN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: Null/missing = ICD-9 
9 = ICD-9 
0 = ICD-10 

COMMENT:
